name: D2-Codex
tagline: Developer Dashboard Codex on Even glasses
description: Bring a live Developer Dashboard Codex workspace onto the Even app and glasses. D2-Codex promotes the broader Developer Dashboard ecosystem for daily AI-assisted operations, skill management, and UI creation around Codex sessions.
changelog: Changed glasses transcript review to move one rendered line per Up or Down gesture, so the first upward gesture no longer jumps the operator to the top of a larger review buffer.

permissions.name: g2-microphone
permissions.desc: This app needs the glasses microphone for the hybrid voice query flow.

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: This app needs network access to reach the paired D2-Codex LAN bridge.
